summary: Completed all 20 steps + 1 prerequisite. Implemented OcctKernelHandle dedicated-thread actor pattern with mpsc/oneshot channels. Removed unsound unsafe Send+Sync from OcctKernel, converted trait impl to inherent methods. OcctKernelHandle implements GeometryKernel and is Send+Sync. All external call sites migrated. 14 new handle tests + all existing tests pass (180+ total, zero warnings).

Completed all remaining steps (pre-2, steps 21-24). Added 4 async companion methods (execute_async, query_async, export_async, tessellate_async) using tx.send().await + reply_rx.await — safe from async contexts. export_async returns Vec<u8> directly (no &mut dyn Write). Added # Panics docs to all sync methods. Implemented async-safe Drop using Handle::try_current() — detaches thread in async context, joins in sync context. Added pub async fn shutdown(self) for deterministic async cleanup via spawn_blocking. All 24 unit tests pass serially, plus boundary4_geometry and reify-eval tests. Plan is now fully complete.
